app.title: Show HN: For 10 World Cups, my model's 2 favorites had the champion every time
app.author: fabioricardo7
proposed_tests: Verify model's predictions on 2018 and 2022 World Cups
Compare model's performance against naive random pick
Evaluate model's performance using metrics such as Brier score and expected calibration error
